name: AgentMessageList
description: Chat message stream for AI agents with role-based styling.

api.name: AgentMessageList
api.description: Chat message stream for AI agents with role-based styling.

parameters.name: Virtualize
parameters.description: Opt-in virtualization for long threads. When true AND Items is supplied, messages render through Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components.Web.Virtualization.Virtualize{TItem} so only the rows near the viewport are in the DOM. Leave false to use the simple ChildContent path (unchanged default).

parameters.name: Items
parameters.description: The per-message render fragments to virtualize. Each entry is rendered as one row (typically an AgentMessage). Only used when Virtualize is true; ignored otherwise.

parameters.name: ItemSize
parameters.description: Estimated row height in pixels for the virtualizer (default 80).

parameters.name: OverscanCount
parameters.description: Extra rows to render above/below the viewport to smooth scrolling (default 4).

parameters.name: ShowScrollButton
parameters.description: When true (default), shows a floating scroll-to-latest button that appears whenever the list is scrolled away from the bottom and, when clicked, jumps back to the newest message. Screen-reader labelled. Set false to hide it (e.g. lists that are never longer than the viewport).

parameters.name: EmptyState
parameters.description: Renders in place of the messages when IsEmpty is true (shadcn ConversationEmptyState parity). When null, a localized default title + description is shown instead.

parameters.name: IsEmpty
parameters.description: When true, the EmptyState slot (or the built-in default) is rendered instead of the message content. The consumer drives this since the list can't introspect an arbitrary ChildContent.

parameters.name: TimeZone
parameters.description: Time zone to render Timestamp in. When set, the timestamp is converted to this zone — pass the END USER'S zone here (in Blazor Server the component runs on the server, so the previous ToLocalTime() showed the SERVER'S zone, which is the bug #303 fixed). When null, the timestamp is rendered in the offset it already carries (a DateTimeOffset knows its own offset), so it is deterministic and server-independent.

parameters.name: TimestampFormat
parameters.description: Custom format string for the visible timestamp (default "HH:mm").

parameters.name: TimestampCulture
parameters.description: Culture used to format the timestamp (defaults to CurrentCulture).

parameters.name: Actions
parameters.description: Optional actions toolbar rendered beneath the message body — typically an AgentMessageActions (copy / regenerate / retry) and/or an AgentMessageBranchNav. Only shown for User and Assistant turns.

parameters.name: Label
parameters.description: Accessible name for the button — used for aria-label, the visually-hidden label, and the tooltip fallback. Required for a11y.

parameters.name: Icon
parameters.description: Icon to render (e.g. LumeoIcons.Copy). Ignored when ChildContent is supplied.

parameters.name: Tooltip
parameters.description: Native title tooltip; defaults to Label when unset.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: Custom button content (overrides Icon).

parameters.name: CopyText
parameters.description: Text copied to the clipboard by the built-in Copy action. When null, no Copy button is rendered.

parameters.name: OnCopy
parameters.description: Invoked after a successful copy (receives the copied text).

parameters.name: OnRegenerate
parameters.description: When set, renders a Regenerate action invoking this callback.

parameters.name: OnRetry
parameters.description: When set, renders a Retry action invoking this callback.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: Additional custom actions appended after the built-ins.

events.name: OnCopy
events.description: Invoked after a successful copy (receives the copied text).

events.name: OnRegenerate
events.description: When set, renders a Regenerate action invoking this callback.

events.name: OnRetry
events.description: When set, renders a Retry action invoking this callback.

parameters.name: Index
parameters.description: Current branch, 0-based. Two-way bindable via @bind-Index.

parameters.name: Count
parameters.description: Total number of branches.

parameters.name: Loop
parameters.description: When true, previous/next wrap around the ends instead of disabling at the first/last branch.

parameters.name: OnPrevious
parameters.description: Invoked (after IndexChanged) when moving to the previous branch.

parameters.name: OnNext
parameters.description: Invoked (after IndexChanged) when moving to the next branch.

events.name: OnPrevious
events.description: Invoked (after IndexChanged) when moving to the previous branch.

events.name: OnNext
events.description: Invoked (after IndexChanged) when moving to the next branch.

slots.name: EmptyState
slots.description: Renders in place of the messages when IsEmpty is true (shadcn ConversationEmptyState parity). When null, a localized default title + description is shown instead.

slots.name: Actions
slots.description: Optional actions toolbar rendered beneath the message body — typically an AgentMessageActions (copy / regenerate / retry) and/or an AgentMessageBranchNav. Only shown for User and Assistant turns.

slots.name: ChildContent
slots.description: Additional custom actions appended after the built-ins.

mdSummary:
# AgentMessageList

Chat message stream for AI agents with role-based styling.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** AI
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/agent-message-list

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| AgentMessageList | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| AgentMessageList | AutoScroll | `bool` | `true` |  |
| AgentMessageList | Virtualize | `bool` | `` | Opt-in virtualization for long threads. When true AND Items is supplied, messages render through Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components.Web.Virtualization.Virtualize{TItem} so only the rows near the viewport are in the DOM. Leave false to use the simple ChildContent path (unchanged default). |
| AgentMessageList | Items | `IReadOnlyList<RenderFragment>?` | `` | The per-message render fragments to virtualize. Each entry is rendered as one row (typically an AgentMessage). Only used when Virtualize is true; ignored otherwise. |
| AgentMessageList | ItemSize | `float` | `80f` | Estimated row height in pixels for the virtualizer (default 80). |
| AgentMessageList | OverscanCount | `int` | `4` | Extra rows to render above/below the viewport to smooth scrolling (default 4). |
| AgentMessageList | ShowScrollButton | `bool` | `true` | When true (default), shows a floating scroll-to-latest button that appears whenever the list is scrolled away from the bottom and, when clicked, jumps back to the newest message. Screen-reader labelled. Set false to hide it (e.g. lists that are never longer than the viewport). |
| AgentMessageList | EmptyState | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Renders in place of the messages when IsEmpty is true (shadcn ConversationEmptyState parity). When null, a localized default title + description is shown instead. |
| AgentMessageList | IsEmpty | `bool` | `` | When true, the EmptyState slot (or the built-in default) is rendered instead of the message content. The consumer drives this since the list can't introspect an arbitrary ChildContent. |
| AgentMessageList | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| AgentMessageList | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| AgentMessage | Role | `AgentMessageRole` | `AgentMessageRole.Assistant` |  |
| AgentMessage | Avatar | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| AgentMessage | Name | `string?` | `` |  |
| AgentMessage | Timestamp | `DateTimeOffset?` | `` |  |
| AgentMessage | TimeZone | `TimeZoneInfo?` | `` | Time zone to render Timestamp in. When set, the timestamp is converted to this zone — pass the END USER'S zone here (in Blazor Server the component runs on the server, so the previous ToLocalTime() showed the SERVER'S zone, which is the bug #303 fixed). When null, the timestamp is rendered in the offset it already carries (a DateTimeOffset knows its own offset), so it is deterministic and server-independent. |
| AgentMessage | TimestampFormat | `string` | `"HH:mm"` | Custom format string for the visible timestamp (default "HH:mm"). |
| AgentMessage | TimestampCulture | `System.Globalization.CultureInfo?` | `` | Culture used to format the timestamp (defaults to CurrentCulture). |
| AgentMessage | IsStreaming | `bool` | `` |  |
| AgentMessage | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| AgentMessage | Actions | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Optional actions toolbar rendered beneath the message body — typically an AgentMessageActions (copy / regenerate / retry) and/or an AgentMessageBranchNav. Only shown for User and Assistant turns. |
| AgentMessage | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| AgentMessage | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| AgentMessageAction | Label | `string?` | `` | Accessible name for the button — used for aria-label, the visually-hidden label, and the tooltip fallback. Required for a11y. |
| AgentMessageAction | Icon | `IconSource?` | `` | Icon to render (e.g. LumeoIcons.Copy). Ignored when ChildContent is supplied. |
| AgentMessageAction | Tooltip | `string?` | `` | Native title tooltip; defaults to Label when unset. |
| AgentMessageAction | OnClick | `EventCallback` | `` |  |
| AgentMessageAction | Disabled | `bool` | `` |  |
| AgentMessageAction | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Custom button content (overrides Icon). |
| AgentMessageAction | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| AgentMessageAction | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| AgentMessageActions | CopyText | `string?` | `` | Text copied to the clipboard by the built-in Copy action. When null, no Copy button is rendered. |
| AgentMessageActions | OnCopy | `EventCallback<string>` | `` | Invoked after a successful copy (receives the copied text). |
| AgentMessageActions | OnRegenerate | `EventCallback` | `` | When set, renders a Regenerate action invoking this callback. |
| AgentMessageActions | OnRetry | `EventCallback` | `` | When set, renders a Retry action invoking this callback. |
| AgentMessageActions | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Additional custom actions appended after the built-ins. |
| AgentMessageActions | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| AgentMessageActions | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| AgentMessageBranchNav | Index | `int` | `` | Current branch, 0-based. Two-way bindable via @bind-Index. |
| AgentMessageBranchNav | IndexChanged | `EventCallback<int>` | `` |  |
| AgentMessageBranchNav | Count | `int` | `` | Total number of branches. |
| AgentMessageBranchNav | Loop | `bool` | `` | When true, previous/next wrap around the ends instead of disabling at the first/last branch. |
| AgentMessageBranchNav | OnPrevious | `EventCallback` | `` | Invoked (after IndexChanged) when moving to the previous branch. |
| AgentMessageBranchNav | OnNext | `EventCallback` | `` | Invoked (after IndexChanged) when moving to the next branch. |
| AgentMessageBranchNav | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| AgentMessageBranchNav | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (AgentMessageList) — RenderFragment slot
- `EmptyState` (AgentMessageList) — Renders in place of the messages when IsEmpty is true (shadcn ConversationEmptyState parity). When null, a localized default title + description is shown instead.
- `Avatar` (AgentMessage) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (AgentMessage) — RenderFragment slot
- `Actions` (AgentMessage) — Optional actions toolbar rendered beneath the message body — typically an AgentMessageActions (copy / regenerate / retry) and/or an AgentMessageBranchNav. Only shown for User and Assistant turns.
- `ChildContent` (AgentMessageAction) — Custom button content (overrides Icon).
- `ChildContent` (AgentMessageActions) — Additional custom actions appended after the built-ins.

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- `AgentMessage`, `AgentMessageAction`, `AgentMessageActions`, `AgentMessageBranchNav`

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- `IComponentInteropService` (Services)
- `ILumeoLocalizer` (Services.Localization)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<AgentMessageList />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-accent`, `--color-background`, `--color-border`, `--color-foreground`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-primary`, `--color-primary-foreground`, `--color-ring`, `--radius`
